input.input: Task: Locate the GitHub repository for the 'Rye' Python package manager. Find the version number of the last release made in the year 2024, and extract the minor version number (the Y in X.Y.Z). Produce a deliverable file at /_outputs/28_result.txt containing: (1) repository URL, (2) the full version string of the last 2024 release, (3) the extracted minor version number (integer), and (4) the next filename (e.g., 'Y.txt'). Include 1–2 citations (URLs). Return only the path(s) and a one-line summary.

output:
/_outputs/28_result.txt

Produced /_outputs/28_result.txt containing the repository URL, last 2024 release (0.43.0), the minor version 43, and next filename 43.txt; citations: https://github.com/astral-sh/rye and https://github.com/astral-sh/rye/releases/tag/0.43.0
